description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a prominent hip roof covered in gray shingles. The exterior walls are finished in white, and the house features multiple green-framed windows of varying sizes, arranged asymmetrically. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by columns, a balcony above, and a large set of windows that likely illuminate a living area. There is a side extension with a smaller roof and a sheltered entryway, as well as a carport or covered parking area on one side. The house sits on a stone or concrete foundation, and the overall design is clean and modern with subtle traditional influences. The structure appears spacious, with ample room for multiple occupants and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a gray hip roof, white exterior, green-framed windows, and a covered porch with balcony. The design features asymmetrical window placement and a carport extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, balcony above, large windows, and carport on the left.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the hip roof, multiple green windows, and the covered entryway with steps.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the back windows, side extension, and the overall roof structure.
description_view_3: Side view showing the balcony, porch, and additional windows, as well as the carport support.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, balcony above, and a prominent overhang
